omitted_declarations.policy_reference:
a. Account information. We collect data when
you create or update your Uber account.
• Address
•
Email
•
First and last name
•
Login name and password
•
Phone number
•
Payment method (including related
payment verification information)
• Profile picture
•
Settings (including accessibility
settings) and preferences
• Uber partner loyalty
program information

b. Trip/order information. This refers to the
details we collect about your trip or order,
including orders placed via guest
checkout features.
•
•
•
Payment information (including amount
charged and payment method)
Proof of delivery (including photo
or signature)
Special instructions, allergies or
food preferences
• Statistics derived from past trip/order
information, such as
• Averages
• Cancellation rates
• Total trips/orders
• Trip or order details, including
• Date and time
• Requested pickup and dropoff
addresses
• Distance traveled
• Restaurant or merchant name and
location
• Items ordered
